up to date, audited 663 packages; in the measurement colum, i want to add: (CL)Collar, (TH)thighs, (KN)knee, (CP)cup size, (BC)Backcro; since we will be using our tablet for this, can you add a button and a displayer, its for the custom; in the settings page, please make it such that we can add any measurement name(field) from there wit; ## Error Type

## Error Message
Body exceeded 1 MB limit.
To configure the body size l; [browser] A tree hydrated but some attributes of the server rendered HTML didn't match the client pr; Supabase is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in .env.local; and i think currently it doesnt save if any column is not filled, i want like if any column isnt fil; when i click "save order" : Could not find the function public.create_order_from_payload(p_payload) ; when i click "save order" : Could not find the function public.create_order_from_payload(p_payload) ; \reset; when i click "save order" : Could not find the function public.create_order_from_payload(p_payload) ; i want to add this: Garment Items -> fabric length, can be multiple orders in one order number, mult; I also want to add such that, inside orders and customers page, we can go and edit the columns if we; can you run a smoke test to see if new order saves propoerly and correctly, I want the customer name; please tell me how to do this:is still not installed or visible in the remote schema cache.

Please bri; i want store logo in all the pdf bills, on right side, in combined copy, there will be two logos, on; in the bill footer for customer, write this instead : Delivery date is approximate. output_preview:
Implemented both changes.

Store-copy delivery date:
- Displayed store receipt now shows `delivery date - 3 days`.
- Combined receipt now shows the adjusted date only in the store section.
- Customer
